title: Allow Direct Image Links to View Directly On Monday

posts.author: Daveco321 (David)
posts.cookedHtml: As the title says, it would be very helpful for us to have direct image links actually display the image rather than a file icon (if you put the image using a file column), or hyperlink. Currently we need to upload our images in an image coloumn and use a file column and create a direct link because we need to often times send updated excel sheets with the images on them but monday does not support that. So in excel we have to take the direct link that is there and in another column do =image(X) so the image displays. Lots of extra steps.
